title: Plugin Management Hardening — IPC safety, state freshness, dynamic import error handling
consumer_purpose: Make plugin management IPC, state reads, and error handling safe against preload gaps, stale signals, and store failures
claim_atoms: All 6 dedicated store IPC handlers wrapped in try/catch with console.error
All window.api calls in dialog-*.tsx files use optional chaining
toggleEnabled, removePlugin, submitInstall fetch fresh state from store instead of reading stale local signal
Dynamic import of dialog-manage-plugins has .catch() handler
loadConfigs catch block logs console.warn instead of silent failure
submitInstall reads from fresh store fetch for duplicate check and array building
